news.t: Top money mangers expect these green-energy companies to benefit most from Biden's infrastructure plan

holdings.infoBox: MOTO is an equity ETF with a total of 39 individual holdings. The top holdings are Quanta Services stock at 5.35%, Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Company at 5.29%, Infineon Technologies AG at 5.26%, Analog Devices at 4.30%, and Amphenol at 4.24%.

overview.description: The Guinness Atkinson Smart Transportation & Technology ETF (MOTO) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in stocks based on a particular theme. The fund is an actively managed fund which has exposure to global companies involved in the advancement of transportation. MOTO was launched on Nov 15, 2019 and is issued by Guinness Atkinson.

data.title: Top money mangers expect these green-energy companies to benefit most from Biden's infrastructure plan
data.text: Major themes are the electrification of transportation and a reduction in the carbon footprint of buildings.
